message:
feat(settings): Enlarge settings modal for better content display

The settings modal was using size="md" (600px width, 600px max-height) which
was too constrained for the amount of content, causing text to wrap awkwardly
and the modal to feel cramped.

Change: size="md" → size="lg" (800px width, 80vh max-height)

This provides adequate space for:
- Appearance settings section with theme selector and toggle buttons
- Beginner Mode section with descriptive text
- Future settings additions without layout issues

The larger modal also improves readability by reducing text density and
allowing settings labels and descriptions to display on single lines.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
